title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: Frida the jaguar cub hones survival skills at Brazil's Caiman Lodge. She sneaks to see sister Anouk, helps her hide, and takes solo treks.

title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: The filmmaker examines the offspring of various animal species from around the world, highlighting their survival skills in extraordinary environments.

title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: The filmmaker examines the offspring of various animal species from around the world, highlighting their survival skills in extraordinary environments.

title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: Thiago, a brave baby coati, sharpens his sniffing and foraging skills, crosses suburban roads near his lush Brazilian forest home and avoids inanimate and four-legged dangers.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate a sea monster that has washed up on an English beach. His journey takes him to the ice sheets of Greenland and the fjords of Norway.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Jeremy was once pulled into a river by a goonch catfish during his very first investigation. Years later, he is worried that the monster has reappeared.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: When a snorkeler is killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate.

title: Animal Attack Rate
subTitle: The filmmaker sheds light on the attack instinct displayed by apex predators of the wild and provides insights into their deadly behaviour.

title: Great Parks of Africa
subTitle: Table Mountain National Park in South Africa is home to a diverse range of plants and animals that belong to the rich ocean and the windswept coast.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims and some large punture wounds.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: The host, a biologist who is an extreme angler, explores freshwater mysteries and local folklore, to debunk fascinating myths and track down harrowing tales.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, takes on the biggest investigation of his career; to unravel what happened to over a thousand passengers of the RMS Laconia, torpedoed in the mid-Atlantic in WWII.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: Wildlife experts offer detailed insights into tourists who came in close contact with baboons in the wild and had their belongings snatched by the animals.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: The host shares moments of human beings coming in contact with wildlife and being left with incredible experiences of animal encounters.

subTitle: When a male leopard stumbles upon the scene of another leopard making a kill, instead of chasing off the other predator and potentially losing the prey, he leaps in to assist.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighbourhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night.

subTitle: Explore the diverse ecosystem of the Addo Elephant National Park in South Africa and the numerous animals that live there.

title: Great Parks of Africa
subTitle: Explore a rare sanctuary at Africa that is inhabited by some of the world's most striking creatures including the black rhino and the giant leatherback turtle.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals make their way to the Acacia Loop. They must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents.

title: Tiger Legacy
subTitle: The filmmaker captures the intimate lives of four female tigers and their cubs in Tadoba, India, over seven years, offering a rare look at their behaviors in their natural habitat.

title: Tiger Legacy
subTitle: Matkasur forces Maya's cubs to go into hiding as he forces himself within her territory. Later, Maya shows the way tigers hunt and preys on a deer after discovering her cubs.

title: The Lions Rule
subTitle: The filmmaker captures the daily activities of animals living in the hot climate of Glade, where the arrival of buffaloes to drink water turns into a feast for predators.

title: The Lions Rule
subTitle: During the dry season in Ruaha state,a herd of elephants visit the water body at Glade to extract the cleanest water using their trunk.
